# big.md — dirty-skill option reference

This reference file dives straight into prose with no table of contents at the top — that is the planted `c-reference-toc` defect (a >100-line reference file must open with a ToC).

## Option --opt1

Enables behaviour 1. Default: off. Accepts no value.
